title: AutoSprint+
description: AutoSprint is a lightweight Minecraft mod that automatically handles sprinting for you. Easily toggle it on or off anytime using /autosprint.
body:
**AutoSprint**

AutoSprint is a lightweight Minecraft mod that automatically handles sprinting for you, so you can focus entirely on movement, combat, and exploration without constantly managing your sprint key.

It is designed to be simple, efficient, and fully compatible with most mods and modpacks.

**Features**

AutoSprint enhances your gameplay by removing the need to manually toggle sprinting.

**Core functionality:**

Automatically enables sprinting when you move forward
No need to double-tap or hold your sprint key
Toggle the feature at any time using a simple command

**Command:**

/autosprint
Enables or disables AutoSprint instantly
Works in-game without needing to restart
Gameplay Benefits
Better focus: Spend less time thinking about controls and more time playing
Improved consistency: Always sprint when you need to, especially in combat or parkour
Accessibility: Great for players who prefer fewer key inputs
Performance

AutoSprint is extremely lightweight and has no noticeable impact on FPS or performance.
It only modifies player sprint behavior and does not affect rendering, world generation, or other systems.

**Configuration**

No complicated setup required.
Simply install the mod and use /autosprint to toggle it on or off whenever you like.
